name: Brambles Limited
analysis: BXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.2000, stop A$16.0182, target A$22.2200 (0.95:1) — then trail it.
